title: Hanoi、Hanoi — 生活成本、住房与搬迁指南 [2026]
description: Hanoi、Hanoi的完整指南：生活成本、房价、社区、远程工作准备情况和搬迁建议。
content:
概述

Hanoi是Hanoi的一个城市，人口约8,250,000。Vietnam’s thousand-year-old capital blends ancient pagodas and tree-lined boulevards with a thriving startup scene, offering a lower cost of living than Ho Chi Minh City.

Last updated: July 20, 2026
